creator: gl@inter-data.dk
text:
I've upgraded ports with portsnap + portupgrade. When trying to make joomla15 i get:
===>  Vulnerability check disabled, database not found
===>  Extracting for joomla15-1.5.3
=> MD5 Checksum mismatch for Joomla_1.5.3-Stable-Full_Package.tar.bz2.
=> SHA256 Checksum mismatch for Joomla_1.5.3-Stable-Full_Package.tar.bz2.
===>  Refetch for 1 more times files: Joomla_1.5.3-Stable-Full_Package.tar.bz2 Joomla_1.5.3-Stable-Full_Package.tar.bz2
===>  Vulnerability check disabled, database not found
=> Joomla_1.5.3-Stable-Full_Package.tar.bz2 doesn't seem to exist in /usr/ports/distfiles/.
=> Attempting to fetch from http://joomlacode.org/gf/download/frsrelease/6731/22005/.
fetch: http://joomlacode.org/gf/download/frsrelease/6731/22005/Joomla_1.5.3-Stable-Full_Package.tar.bz2: size unknown
fetch: http://joomlacode.org/gf/download/frsrelease/6731/22005/Joomla_1.5.3-Stable-Full_Package.tar.bz2: size of remote file is not known
Joomla_1.5.3-Stable-Full_Package.tar.bz2              8714  B   26 kBps
===>  Vulnerability check disabled, database not found
=> MD5 Checksum mismatch for Joomla_1.5.3-Stable-Full_Package.tar.bz2.
=> SHA256 Checksum mismatch for Joomla_1.5.3-Stable-Full_Package.tar.bz2.
===>  Giving up on fetching files: Joomla_1.5.3-Stable-Full_Package.tar.bz2 Joomla_1.5.3-Stable-Full_Package.tar.bz2
Make sure the Makefile and distinfo file (/usr/ports/www/joomla15/distinfo)
are up to date.  If you are absolutely sure you want to override this
check, type "make NO_CHECKSUM=yes [other args]".
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/www/joomla15.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/www/joomla15.

I guess the tar-balls have re-rolled or something?

How-To-Repeat: portsnap fetch
portsnap update
portupgrade -a
cd /usr/ports/www/joomla15
make
